name: Sine
description: An oscilloscope holding a slow waveform — half-circle crests flip trough to crest down the rows, re-tuned in amplitude per redraw.

code.style: --trace: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -2%; width: 104%; bottom: 50%; height: @rand(28%, 46%); border: calc(22px / @Y) solid var(--trace); border-bottom: none; border-radius: 999px 999px 0 0; opacity: @rand(0.6, 1); box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 600ms; } } @match(x % 2 == 0) { :after { transform: scaleY(-1); transform-origin: 50% 100%; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
